name: Communicator Toolkit
description: A bundle of three communication skills for consulting and leadership contexts: stakeholder updates, presentation narrative, and workshop facilitation. Example of a multi-skill plugin.
author: Franz Waldner
example_prompt: Help me write a stakeholder update for our AI programme

skills.name: Stakeholder Update Writer
skills.description: Writes concise, well-structured stakeholder updates for programmes, projects and initiatives.
skills.example_prompt: Write a stakeholder update for our AI transformation programme — we're on track but budget is tight

skills.name: Presentation Narrative Builder
skills.description: Builds a clear storyline and narrative arc for a presentation before any slides are created.
skills.example_prompt: Help me build the narrative for a board presentation on our digital strategy

skills.name: Workshop Facilitator Guide
skills.description: Designs workshop agendas, facilitation guides and exercises for strategy, ideation or alignment sessions.
skills.example_prompt: Design a half-day workshop to align leadership on our AI priorities
